feedItems.description: allocated £82.2m to Adult Social Care (≈£422 per resident)
allocated £54.7m to Children's Social Care (≈£280 per resident)
allocated £17.0m to Environment & Streets (≈£87 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £114 (5.1%) to £2351
